steps.title: Extract slope and y-intercept from the problem
steps.content:
This describes a linear relationship. In the form $y = mx + b$:
  • At birth ($x = 0$), length is 162 cm, so the y-intercept is $b = 162$
  • The whale grows 4.8 cm per month, so the slope is $m = 4.8$

steps.title: Write the equation and match to choices
steps.content:
With $m = 4.8$ and $b = 162$:
$$y = 4.8x + 162$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
